# NutriPreferred – Herbalife with Jaffa & Dan

> Sign up as a Herbalife Preferred Customer for exclusive product discounts or become an Independent Distributor. Wellness support, free shake recipes, and business opportunities.

## About

NutriPreferred is run by Jaffa & Dan Leffler, Independent Herbalife Members operating under Leffler International Investments Pty Ltd. We help people achieve their health, energy, and lifestyle goals through Herbalife nutrition products and business opportunities.

## What is a Herbalife Preferred Customer?

A Herbalife Preferred Customer enjoys exclusive savings of up to 25% on all Herbalife nutrition products, including shakes, supplements, and weight management items. Preferred Customers receive personalized wellness support and access to free shake recipes.

## What is an Independent Herbalife Distributor?

An Independent Herbalife Distributor can earn income by building their own Herbalife business from home. Distributors receive full training, mentorship, and support to help others achieve their wellness goals while growing a home-based business.

## How to Sign Up

1. Visit https://www.no1proteinforglp1.com
2. Choose Preferred Customer or Independent Distributor
3. Click Sign Up to open the official Herbalife registration form
4. Use sponsor: Jaffa Leffler – ID 05458162C – LEF
5. Email leffleryd@gmail.com after registration for personalized support
